states.desc_zh: 项目刚搭起的最初状态：6 个用户级 skill + 5 个 builtin。一条 founder → meta → desktop → closeout → ip 的主生命周期链。
states.desc_en: The very first state: 6 user skills + 5 builtins. One main lifecycle chain founder → meta → desktop → closeout → ip.
bullets_zh: 6 个用户级 skill：ADK、CR、NF、SPT、PAT、SCS
5 个 builtin（虚线边框）：GM、RW、ASR、FE、PW
主链：SPT → ADK → NF → CR → PAT → SCS
bullets_en: 6 user skills: ADK, CR, NF, SPT, PAT, SCS
5 builtins (dashed): GM, RW, ASR, FE, PW
Main chain: SPT → ADK → NF → CR → PAT → SCS

states.desc_zh: tooling 域块自动创建，GPS 节点孤立加入。agent 自动添加 toolingDomain classDef。
states.desc_en: tooling domain block is auto-created; GPS joins as isolated node. Agent adds toolingDomain classDef.
states.delta_zh: +1 node (GPS in tooling) · +1 classDef · +1 self-loop edge · PNG 224500 → 259330 (+15.5%)
states.delta_en: +1 node (GPS in tooling) · +1 classDef · +1 self-loop edge · PNG 224500 → 259330 (+15.5%)
bullets_zh: 推断结果：tooling 域（命中 ppt / swiss style / html，得分 3）
新节点：GPS[guizang-ppt-skill]:::toolingDomain
新边：GPS 自环 fallback（同域无 peer）
bullets_en: Inference: tooling (matched ppt / swiss style / html, score 3)
New node: GPS[guizang-ppt-skill]:::toolingDomain
New edge: GPS self-loop (no same-domain peer yet)

states.desc_zh: skill 的 description 过宽，关键词推断返回 uncategorized，agent 提示用户手工归 meta。SC 与 ADK 同域，自动加 dashed 边。
states.desc_en: Description too generic; inference returns uncategorized; user manually picks meta. SC joins meta with ADK; dashed same-domain edge added.
states.delta_zh: +1 node (SC in meta) · +1 same-domain edge → ADK · PNG 259330 → 270529 (+4.3%)
states.delta_en: +1 node (SC in meta) · +1 same-domain edge → ADK · PNG 259330 → 270529 (+4.3%)
bullets_zh: 推断结果：uncategorized → 用户手选 meta
新节点：SC[skill-creator]:::metaDomain
新边：SC -. "同域" .-> ADK
bullets_en: Inference: uncategorized → user picks meta manually
New node: SC[skill-creator]:::metaDomain
New edge: SC -. "same domain" .-> ADK

states.desc_zh: agent-reach 是个特殊 skill —— 来自 Python CLI 工具（pipx install agent-reach），SKILL.md 落在 ~/.agents/skills/。通过软链桥接到 opencode 和 portal。归入 tooling 域，与 GPS 同域。
states.desc_en: agent-reach is a special skill — it ships as a Python CLI (pipx install agent-reach) and writes SKILL.md to ~/.agents/skills/. Symlinked into opencode and portal. Classified as tooling, peer to GPS.
states.delta_zh: +1 node (AR in tooling) · +1 same-domain edge → GPS · PNG 270529 → 280641 (+3.7%)
states.delta_en: +1 node (AR in tooling) · +1 same-domain edge → GPS · PNG 270529 → 280641 (+3.7%)
bullets_zh: 推断结果：meta（命中 agent）→ 手工归到 tooling（更符合「横切层」定位）
新节点：AR[agent-reach]:::toolingDomain
新边：AR -. "同域" .-> GPS（tooling 域内 peer 已存在）
桥接：~/.config/opencode/skills/agent-reach → ~/.agents/skills/agent-reach（symlink）
bullets_en: Inference: meta (matched 'agent') → manually reclassified to tooling (better fits cross-cutting)
New node: AR[agent-reach]:::toolingDomain
New edge: AR -. "same domain" .-> GPS (tooling now has a peer)
Bridge: ~/.config/opencode/skills/agent-reach → ~/.agents/skills/agent-reach (symlink)

states.title_zh: State 4：装 superpowers 全套（14 个 sub-skill）
states.desc_zh: obra/superpowers 是一个 monorepo 形态的 skill 集合——14 个独立 sub-skill 覆盖工程方法论：brainstorm / TDD / subagent / debug / review 全链。8 个归 meta 域（方法论与工程基础设施），6 个归 closeout 域（review/branch/verification）。一次性装入，让 agent 拥有完整的「decompose → execute → review → finish」能力。
states.desc_en: obra/superpowers ships as a monorepo of 14 sub-skills covering engineering methodology: brainstorm / TDD / subagent / debug / review end-to-end. 8 go to meta (methodology + infra), 6 go to closeout (review/branch/verification). Installed in one shot — gives agents the full decompose → execute → review → finish loop.
states.delta_zh: +14 nodes (8 meta + 6 closeout) · meta 域 2→10 · closeout 域 1→7 · PNG 280641 → 508189 (+81%)
states.delta_en: +14 nodes (8 meta + 6 closeout) · meta domain 2→10 · closeout domain 1→7 · PNG 280641 → 508189 (+81%)
bullets_zh: monorepo 形态：obra/superpowers 仓库下 skills/ 子目录里 14 个独立 SKILL.md，每个走 portal API 单独装
推断挑战：14 个里 7 个返回 uncategorized，agent 按 "工程方法论 → meta，提交闭环 → closeout" 原则手工归类
meta 域新增 8 个：brainstorming / dispatching-parallel-agents / subagent-driven-development / systematic-debugging / test-driven-development / using-superpowers / writing-plans / writing-skills
closeout 域新增 6 个：executing-plans / finishing-a-development-branch / receiving-code-review / requesting-code-review / using-git-worktrees / verification-before-completion
图谱体积：280641 → 508189 字节（+81%），meta/closeout 两个域块都明显变大
核心价值：让 agent 在做复杂工程时有「先 brainstorm、再写 plan、然后 TDD、并行 dispatch、最后 verify-before-completion」的方法论支架
bullets_en: Monorepo form: 14 independent SKILL.md under obra/superpowers/skills/, each installed via portal API one by one
Inference challenge: 7 of 14 returned uncategorized; agent manually classified by 'engineering methodology → meta, commit closeout → closeout'
meta domain +8: brainstorming / dispatching-parallel-agents / subagent-driven-development / systematic-debugging / test-driven-development / using-superpowers / writing-plans / writing-skills
closeout domain +6: executing-plans / finishing-a-development-branch / receiving-code-review / requesting-code-review / using-git-worktrees / verification-before-completion
Graph size: 280641 → 508189 bytes (+81%), both meta and closeout domain blocks visibly grew
Core value: gives agents methodology scaffolding for complex work — brainstorm first, write plan, then TDD, dispatch in parallel, verify before completion

states.desc_zh: 带 citation 的远程知识库 — 让 agent 调 Google NotebookLM 问你的个人文档库，Gemini 仅基于上传的文档回答，每条回复带出处引用。归 tooling 域，与 agent-reach（互联网读取）、guizang-ppt-skill（PPT 生成）共同构成横切层「外部信息源接入」三件套。
states.desc_en: Citation-grounded remote knowledge base — lets agents query your personal Google NotebookLM library; Gemini answers strictly from your uploaded documents with citations attached. Goes to tooling domain, joining agent-reach (internet read) and guizang-ppt-skill (PPT generation) as the three external-information adapters.
states.delta_zh: +1 node (N in tooling) · tooling 域 2→3 · PNG 508189 → 521852 (+2.7%)
bullets_zh: Browser 自动化查询 NotebookLM，每问一次开独立 session 再关闭
Gemini 仅从你上传的文档里拿答案 — 严重压低 hallucination，每条带 citation 出处
smart-add：扔个 NotebookLM URL 进来，先查一次问内容自动生成 description/topics 再入库
需要 Google 账号认证（Cookie 持久化在本机）+ Python + playwright/browser-use
tooling 域第 3 个成员：与 agent-reach（互联网公共信息）、guizang-ppt-skill（PPT 输出）形成「读外部 / 写内部」工具集
bullets_en: Browser automation queries NotebookLM, each question opens a fresh session then closes
Gemini answers strictly from your uploaded documents — hallucinations drastically reduced, every reply has citations
smart-add: drop a NotebookLM URL, the skill queries it first to auto-generate description/topics before registering
Requires Google auth (cookies persisted locally) + Python + playwright/browser-use
3rd tooling member: with agent-reach (public internet) and guizang-ppt-skill (PPT output), forms the read-external / write-internal tool trio

states.desc_zh: 带登录态的浏览器自动化 — 让 agent 用你的浏览器 session 访问公域 + 私域信息。36 平台 103 命令开箱即用，支持表单填写、网络请求拦截/mock、操作录制。归 tooling 域，与 agent-reach（API 接入）、notebooklm（NotebookLM 知识库）形成「读外部信息」三件套：bb-browser 主打登录态后的私域、agent-reach 主打公开 API、notebooklm 主打个人文档库。
states.desc_en: Logged-in browser automation — lets agents use your real browser session to access public AND private web data. 36 platforms / 103 commands out of the box; form filling, network intercept/mock, action recording. Goes to tooling, joining agent-reach (API access) and notebooklm (private docs) as the read-external information trio: bb-browser for logged-in private web, agent-reach for public APIs, notebooklm for personal docs.
states.delta_zh: +1 node (BB in tooling) · tooling 域 3→4 · PNG 521852 → 528282 (+1.2%)
bullets_zh: monorepo 形态：bb-browser 仓库下有通用版 + OpenClaw 专版两个 SKILL.md，agent 自动检测后让用户选了通用版
核心能力：用真实浏览器跑（不是 headless），所以登录态、cookie、user-agent 都是你本人的，能进任何已登录的内部系统
36 平台 103 命令：Twitter / Reddit / GitHub / YouTube / 知乎 / B站 / 微博 等，每个都封成单条 CLI 命令开箱即用
高阶能力：带登录态 fetch、网络请求拦截与 mock、操作录制 — 不是单纯爬虫而是浏览器自动化平台
tooling 域第 4 个成员：与 agent-reach（公共 API）、notebooklm（私有文档库）、guizang-ppt-skill（PPT 输出）共同构成「读外部 / 写内部」工具集
bullets_en: Monorepo: bb-browser repo has a generic version + an OpenClaw-specific one; agent auto-detected and user picked the generic.
Core capability: runs against your real browser (not headless), so login state, cookies, user-agent are all yours — can access any logged-in internal system.
36 platforms / 103 commands: Twitter, Reddit, GitHub, YouTube, Zhihu, Bilibili, Weibo, etc. — each wrapped as a single CLI command, ready to use.
Advanced: logged-in fetch, network request intercept + mock, action recording — not just a scraper, a full browser automation platform.
4th tooling member: with agent-reach (public APIs), notebooklm (private docs), guizang-ppt-skill (PPT output), forms the read-external / write-internal toolkit.

states.title_zh: State 7：装 gstack 精选 18 件套
states.desc_zh: garrytan/gstack 是 YC 风格的全栈工程方法论 monorepo（51 个 SKILL.md），从中精选 18 个补全「规划→评审→QA→发布→上下文管理」全链路。13 个归 meta（方法论+评审+上下文），1 个归 closeout（land-and-deploy），4 个归 tooling（design 三件 + 文档输出两件）。跳过 OpenClaw 专版（不适用）和浏览器组（与 bb-browser 重叠）。
states.desc_en: garrytan/gstack is a YC-style full-stack engineering methodology monorepo (51 SKILL.md). Selected 18 to complete the plan→review→QA→deploy→context-mgmt chain. 13 → meta (methodology+review+context), 1 → closeout (land-and-deploy), 4 → tooling (design trio + doc output duo). Skipped OpenClaw-specific (N/A) and browser group (overlaps with bb-browser).
states.delta_zh: +18 nodes (12 meta + 1 closeout + 5 tooling) · meta 域 10→22 · closeout 域 7→8 · tooling 域 4→9 · PNG 528282 → 545053 (+3.2%)
states.delta_en: +18 nodes (12 meta + 1 closeout + 5 tooling) · meta 10→22 · closeout 7→8 · tooling 4→9 · PNG 528282 → 545053 (+3.2%)
bullets_zh: monorepo 形态：gstack 仓库共 51 个 SKILL.md，agent 自动 scan 后展示菜单让用户手选了 18 个
meta 域 +12：autoplan / investigate / office-hours / plan-ceo-review / plan-eng-review / plan-design-review / plan-devex-review / plan-tune / qa / qa-only / context-save / context-restore（YC 全套方法论）
closeout 域 +1：land-and-deploy（merge → CI → 部署 → canary 验证一气呵成）
tooling 域 +5：design-consultation / design-review / design-html（设计三件套）+ make-pdf / document-generate（文档输出）
明确跳过：OpenClaw 4 个专版（用户不用 OpenClaw）、浏览器组 7 个（与已装的 bb-browser 重叠）、gbrain 设施类（不在当前优先级）
总规模：43 skill 跨 6 域，meta 域已成绝对主体（22 个，从「方法论真空」到「YC 全栈方法论库」）
bullets_en: Monorepo: gstack ships 51 SKILL.md; agent auto-scanned, presented a menu, user picked 18.
meta +12: autoplan, investigate, office-hours, plan-{ceo,eng,design,devex}-review, plan-tune, qa, qa-only, context-save, context-restore (YC methodology suite).
closeout +1: land-and-deploy (merge → CI → deploy → canary verify in one shot).
tooling +5: design-consultation/review/html (design trio) + make-pdf/document-generate (doc output).
Explicitly skipped: 4 OpenClaw-specific skills (user doesn't use OpenClaw), 7 browser skills (overlaps installed bb-browser), gbrain infra (not yet prioritized).
Total: 43 skills across 6 domains; meta now dominant (22) — from methodology void to full YC engineering library.

states.title_zh: State 8：装 ui-ux-pro-max（dry-run 后精挑 1 个）
states.title_en: State 8: ui-ux-pro-max installed (1 picked after dry-run)
states.desc_zh: UI/UX 设计智能库 — 50+ 风格、161 配色、57 字体配对、161 产品类型、99 UX 指南、25 图表类型，跨 10 个技术栈（React/Next/Vue/Svelte/SwiftUI/RN/Flutter/Tailwind/shadcn/HTML）。这是 dry-run 流程首次实战的成果：原 monorepo 7 个 SKILL.md 中 6 个因为 name 含 `ckm:` 冒号违反命名规则、且都在 `.claude/` 路径下被 installer 过滤；只有 ui-ux-pro-max 这 1 个合法且零重叠，最终只装它。归 tooling 域。
states.desc_en: UI/UX design intelligence — 50+ styles, 161 color palettes, 57 font pairings, 161 product types, 99 UX guidelines, 25 chart types across 10 stacks (React/Next/Vue/Svelte/SwiftUI/RN/Flutter/Tailwind/shadcn/HTML). First real use of the dry-run flow: of the 7 SKILL.md in the monorepo, 6 were rejected (names contain 'ckm:' colon violating naming regex, all under .claude/ filtered by installer); only ui-ux-pro-max passed and had zero overlap. Goes to tooling.
states.delta_zh: +1 node (UUPM in tooling) · tooling 域 9→10 · PNG 545053 → 544443 (-0.1%)
bullets_zh: dry-run 流程首战：scan 发现 7 个 SKILL.md → 读 frontmatter → 与已装 9 个 tooling skill 做重叠分析 → 推荐 'A. 只装 ui-ux-pro-max' → 用户确认后才真装
工程发现 1：portal installer 的 SKILL_NAME_RE = ^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$ 不接受冒号，6 个 ckm:* skill 即使能 clone 也会 frontmatter 校验失败
工程发现 2：installer 过滤 . 起头目录（防止扫到 .git/.github），但 scan_monorepo 的 GitHub trees API 调用没过滤 — 两端语义不一致，是个待修的小 bug
工程发现 3：dry-run 模式让 mega-skill 'ckm:design'（一个 skill 包 logo+CIP+slides+banner+icon+social photos）的功能重叠在装之前就暴露，避免噪声入库
ui-ux-pro-max 真实价值：UI/UX 知识库（50 风格 / 161 配色 / 57 字体 / 99 UX 指南），不是「执行型」而是「参考型」 — agent 在你说「设计一个 SaaS dashboard」时能查询匹配风格 + 配色 + 字体
tooling 域第 10 个成员，与 design-* / make-pdf / guizang-ppt-skill 形成「输出工具链 + 设计参考库」格局
bullets_en: First real dry-run: scan found 7 SKILL.md → read frontmatter → overlap analysis vs 9 existing tooling skills → recommended 'A. install only ui-ux-pro-max' → user confirmed before install.
Engineering finding 1: portal installer's SKILL_NAME_RE = ^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$ rejects colons; 6 'ckm:*' skills would fail frontmatter validation even if cloned.
Engineering finding 2: installer filters dot-prefixed dirs (.git/.github protection) but scan_monorepo's GitHub trees API call does NOT — semantic inconsistency, minor bug to fix.
Engineering finding 3: dry-run exposed mega-skill 'ckm:design' (one skill bundling logo+CIP+slides+banner+icon+social photos) duplicating existing tools before install — avoided noise.

ui-ux-pro-max's real value: a UI/UX knowledge base (50 styles, 161 palettes, 57 fonts, 99 UX guides) — reference, not execution. Agent queries it when you say 'design a SaaS dashboard' to match style + palette + fonts.
10th tooling member; with design-* / make-pdf / guizang-ppt-skill forms 'output toolchain + design reference library' structure.

states.title_zh: State 9：dry-scan open-design → 装 5 个上游正牌仓库（8 个 skill）
states.title_en: State 9: dry-scan open-design → install 5 upstream repos (8 skills)
states.desc_zh: dry-scan nexu-io/open-design 揭示一个重要工程教训：该仓库不是 skill 集，是 Claude Design / Figma 的开源替代品产品（43k stars），它的 skills/ 是 131 个「目录卡片」（catalogue entries），每张卡只是个广告说「真 skill 在某个上游仓库」。我们没装这些卡片，而是顺着卡片找到 5 个上游正牌仓库，装了 8 个真实 skill，全归 tooling 域。
states.desc_en: dry-scan revealed nexu-io/open-design is NOT a skill collection but a Claude Design / Figma open-source alternative (43k stars). Its skills/ contains 131 'catalogue entries' — each just a card saying 'real skill lives at upstream repo X'. Instead of installing the cards, we followed them to 5 upstream repos and installed 8 real skills, all in tooling.
bullets_zh: dry-scan 工程教训：open-design 的 skills/ 是 catalogue（广告卡），不是真 skill 本体。装卡片等于装一堆指路牌，真内容在卡片的 upstream 字段

5 个上游仓库 + 8 个 skill：(1) meodai/skill.color-expert (1) (2) Leonxlnx/taste-skill (1, 内含 12 个挑了 1) (3) smixs/creative-director-skill (1) (4) coreyhaines31/marketingskills (2, 内含 40 个挑了 marketing-psychology + copywriting) (5) raintree-technology/apple-hig-skills (3, 内含 14 个挑了 foundations + platforms + components-controls)
color-expert：286K 字色彩科学库（OKLCH/OKLAB/contrast/palette generation）— 比 ui-ux-pro-max 的 161 配色清单深得多
design-taste-frontend (Leonxlnx)：实际 name=design-taste-frontend 不是 taste-skill — 提醒未来：subdir 名 ≠ frontmatter name
apple-hig 3 件套：foundations (设计原则) + platforms (iOS/macOS/visionOS/watchOS/tvOS 基线) + components-controls (按钮/选择器/滑块)
性能：marketingskills 2 个 → 4.7s（一次 clone）；apple-hig 3 个 → 17.9s；普通仓库 5-6s 内搞定
重要工程发现：open-design 仓库本身 git clone 超时 5+ 分钟，installer 加 --filter=blob:none 也没用 — 这是它的 pack 文件巨大 + 我们 IP throttling 双重问题。结论：超大产品级仓库不适合走 portal install 路径
bullets_en: dry-scan lesson: open-design's skills/ is a catalogue (ad cards), not the actual skills. Each card has an 'upstream' field pointing to the real repo.

5 upstream repos + 8 skills: (1) meodai/skill.color-expert (1) (2) Leonxlnx/taste-skill (picked 1 of 12) (3) smixs/creative-director-skill (1) (4) coreyhaines31/marketingskills (picked 2 of 40: marketing-psychology + copywriting) (5) raintree-technology/apple-hig-skills (picked 3 of 14: foundations + platforms + components-controls).
color-expert: 286K-word color science library (OKLCH/OKLAB/contrast/palette generation) — much deeper than ui-ux-pro-max's 161-palette list.
design-taste-frontend (Leonxlnx): actual name is design-taste-frontend, NOT taste-skill — reminder: subdir name ≠ frontmatter name.
apple-hig trio: foundations (design principles) + platforms (iOS/macOS/visionOS/watchOS/tvOS baselines) + components-controls (buttons/pickers/sliders).
Performance: marketingskills 2 → 4.7s (one clone); apple-hig 3 → 17.9s; normal repos 5-6s each.
Critical finding: open-design itself git-clones for 5+ min even with --filter=blob:none. Combination of huge pack + IP throttle. Conclusion: massive product repos are NOT suitable for portal install.
